Zhao Hong и¶ҷејҳ
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhao Hong (и¶ҷејҳ). Fought with Zhu Jun at Wan, held out for eight months but was killed by Sun Jian. Zhao Hong was affiliated with Yellow Scarves. Zhao Hong lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
